item.title: Trusted Advisor
item.description: Pre-requisites Full access with Business/Enterprise support plan, otherwise full access to service limit checks, and 6 security checks. This applies to accounts in an org as well. If the management account has Enterprise access, but the member account only has a Basic support plan, full checks for the member account will not be available. Features Checks are refreshed automatically every week, you can force a manual refresh as well for all or a specific check (api/console) Configure upto 50 reports with region/OU filters etc.
